programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don receives a visitor from his past; Stan embarrasses a superior; Ginsberg gets help from Peggy with a problem; Harry finds a new ally.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Peggy collects research for a pitch; Pete receives an invitation to an exclusive club; Joan is eager to spend time with her friend.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don is troubled by a letter; Peggy may seek a new future on a risky venture; Roger receives a phone call; Pete and Cutler butt heads.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don attempts to track down a friend; Joan tries to solve a problem with an account; an unlikely person sets up Peggy.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank rants against Railton College, calling it "Mediocrity's Capitol," and the administration is pressured to fire him; Hank and Lily contemplate a future outside of Railton.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: When George Saunders visits Railton College, the professors scramble to impress the celebrated writer, while Hank is reminded of his own failed writing career; Hank and Lily anticipate an announcement from their daughter Julie.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank spirals when a storage pod full of his father's belongings is dropped in his front yard; the professors spiral when rumors of budget cuts threaten their tenured jobs.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Amid firing rumors, the professors look to the union to protect their jobs, while Hank tries a different approach; Lily interviews for a job at a prestigious New York prep school.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank and Lily host the annual English department dinner; Lily has a decision to make; Hank's past involving his troubled relationship with his father catches up to him.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank and Tony travel to an academic conference, where their differing philosophies on work and life cause friction; Lily mediates trouble in Julie and Russell's marriage.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank contends with the return of his father to Railton; Lily hunts for apartments in New York; Julie looks to Hank for help in Lily's absence.

programme.title: Lucky Hank
programme.desc: Hank is faced with an impossible decision at work, as his department's jobs are on the line; Lily settles into a new normal in New York.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: In a world of jaded billionaires, psychiatrist-gurus, bio-hacked tech bros, AI labs and disillusioned teens being optimized in elite private schools, an audacious data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power.

programme.title: BlackBerry: The Limited Series
programme.desc: Mike Lazaridis and Doug Fregin pitch their idea of combining a computer with a cellphone to Jim Balsillie; Jim comes on board, and they try to sell their idea.

programme.title: BlackBerry: The Limited Series
programme.desc: BlackBerry hits the market; Mike and Jim try to avoid a hostile takeover; Jim strategizes to increase sales.

programme.title: BlackBerry: The Limited Series
programme.desc: Apple announces the iPhone; Mike scrambles to please Verizon; Jim is unreachable trying to make a personal business deal; the Securities and Exchange Commission investigates the company.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: While Joe launches his latest product, Gordon settles in at Mutiny; Donna and Cameron work to expand beyond chat.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Cameron and Donna have a hard time finding venture capital; Joe hires a key coder and leaves the rest of the team at a loss.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Gordon and Donna's personal life bleeds into work, causing tension at the office; Joe meets with the MacMillan board.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: A game of laser tag teaches Gordon the importance of teamwork; Donna and Cameron disagree on their acquisition.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: Donna and Gordon treat themselves to a vacation at home instead of camping; Joe and Ryan have a revelation; Cameron and Bos return to Texas.

programme.title: Halt and Catch Fire
programme.desc: An offer to purchase Mutiny creates tension; Gordon and Cam bond over video games while Donna has a weekend to herself; Joe faces off against the board.

programme.title: The Audacity
programme.desc: In a world of jaded billionaires, psychiatrist-gurus, bio-hacked tech bros, AI labs and disillusioned teens being optimized in elite private schools, an audacious data-mining CEO strives to turn insight and influence into profit and power.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don receives unwanted advice from Roger; Peggy and Stan do not agree on an account's personnel; Harry requests Don's blessing.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Roger pawns off a project on Don; Joan goes on a business trip; Peggy and Pete cannot agree on how to deal with an account.

programme.title: Mad Men
programme.desc: Don comes up with a big idea; Roger asks Joan to help him fix a clerical error; Peggy has difficulties casting for a commercial.
